zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Calthorpe於1470年出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普時，他的父親Sir William Calthorpe60歲，母親Elizabeth Stapleton30歲。他於大約1491年與Mrs Ann Calthorpe在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1535年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Calthorpe于1470年出生在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普时，他的父亲Sir William Calthorpe60岁，母亲Elizabeth Stapleton30岁。他于大约1491年与Mrs Ann Calthorpe在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1535年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Calthorpe was born in 1470, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir William Calthorpe, was 60 and his mother, Elizabeth Stapleton, was 30. He married Mrs Ann Calthorpe about 1491, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1535, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Calthorpe est né en 1470, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Calthorpe, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stapleton, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Ann Calthorpe environ 1491, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1535, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Calthorpe 1470 in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Calthorpe 60 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stapleton 30. Er hat um 1491 in England Mrs Ann Calthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1535 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Calthorpe è nato il nel 1470 nel Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir William Calthorpe, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stapleton, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Ann Calthorpe circa 1491, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1535, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Calthorpeが1470年にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで生まれた時，父Sir William Calthorpeは60歳，母Elizabeth Stapletonは30歳であった。約1491年にイギリスでMrs Ann Calthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1535年にフランスピカーディソンメで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Calthorpe(이)가 1470년 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Calthorpe(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stapleton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1491년 영국에서 Mrs Ann Calthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1535년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Calthorpe nasceu em 1470, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Calthorpe, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stapleton, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Ann Calthorpe aproximadamente 1491, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1535, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Calthorpe родился в 1470 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Calthorpe было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stapleton, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Ann Calthorpe около 1491 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1535 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Calthorpe nació en 1470, en Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Calthorpe, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stapleton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mrs Ann Calthorpe aproximadamente 1491, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1535, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
